arts.ttl: Jose Mourinho exposes Ruben Amorim and Sir Jim Ratcliffe's character as pressure ramps up
arts.sum: Jose Mourinho has given his take on compatriot Ruben Amorim's struggles at Manchester United, as well as the controversy surrounding Red Devils co-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe

arts.sum: Manchester United are actively pursuing reinforcements to bolster their squad ahead of the upcoming season – and CaughtOffside has been told that two prominent names on their radar are RB Leipzig’s striker Benjamin Sesko and Burnley’s goalkeeper James Trafford. arts.ttl: “You can’t say no to Manchester United” – Player says rejecting Red Devils wasn’t an option despite warnings
arts.sum: André Onana insists he couldn’t reject Manchester United despite being aware of the challenges at Old Trafford. The Cameroon international has been speaking to Media Carré on various topics including his move to Manchester United. L’Attaquant have relayed his comments. arts.ttl: Former Man Utd star paints grim picture for boss Ruben Amorim and his broken players
arts.sum: Man Utd only have the Europa League left to play for this season, with former striker Louis Saha claiming it could take up to two years for Ruben Amorim to rebuild the team.

arts.ttl: 'That's it' - Ruben Amorim makes honest point about Rasmus Hojlund's Man United goal drought
arts.sum: Rasmus Hojlund will be desperate to end his 18-game goal drought when Man United face Real Sociedad in the Europa League.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim given Man Utd Champions League return timeline as Old Trafford overhaul measured in transfer windows
arts.sum: The Portuguese manager has suffered a torrid time at Old Trafford so far

arts.ttl: Matthijs de Ligt says he is NOT shocked by Man Utd crisis in scathing assessment
arts.sum: Manchester United have endured an awful season under both Erik ten Hag and Ruben Amorim and summer signing Matthijs de Ligt has issued a brutal assessment of the side

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim can unleash long overdue Manchester United debutant vs Real Sociedad
arts.sum: Man United head coach Ruben Amorim could finally give Harry Amass his senior debut when his team faces Real Sociedad in the Europa League.

arts.ttl: ‘Not such a far-fetched idea’ – Manchester United given hope of huge summer signing, key reasons suggested
arts.sum: Some days ago, Manchester United were said to be considering the possibility of making a cash plus player offer for Napoli’s Victor Osimhen.
